---
title: "Final Paper Submission"
output: pdf_document
date: "2025-12-15"
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(Amelia)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(caret)
library(scales)
```


# EDA

## Data
```{r}
train <- read.csv("~/Downloads/trainCancerTrain.csv")
test <- read.csv("~/Downloads/trainCancerTestNoY.csv")
dim(test)
train <- train[-1]
test<- test[-1]
head(train,20)
```

## Missing Value Analysis
```{r}
sum(is.na(train))
colSums(is.na(train))
sum(is.na(train))/ (nrow(train)*ncol(train))

sum(is.na(test))
colSums(is.na(test))
sum(is.na(test))/ (nrow(test)*ncol(test))
```

```{r}
missmap(train)
missmap(test)
```

```{r}
predictors <- train[, setdiff(names(train), "Cancer")]

sum(sapply(predictors, is.numeric))
sum(sapply(predictors, is.character))
```

## Numerical to Categorical
```{r}
train$BMI <- cut(
  train$BMI,
  breaks = c(0, 18.5, 24.9, 29.9, 50),
  labels = c("Underweight", "Normal", "Overweight", "Obese"),
  right = TRUE
)

train$BMI <- as.factor(train$BMI)

test$BMI <- cut(
  test$BMI,
  breaks = c(0, 18.5, 24.9, 29.9, 50),
  labels = c("Underweight", "Normal", "Overweight", "Obese"),
  right = TRUE
)

test$BMI <- as.factor(test$BMI) 
```

```{r}
train$income <- cut(
  train$income,
  breaks = c(0, 56600, 169000, Inf),
  labels = c("Low", "Middle", "Upper"),
  right = TRUE
)
train$income <- as.factor(train$income)

test$income <- cut(
  test$income,
  breaks = c(0, 56600, 169000, Inf),
  labels = c("Low", "Middle", "Upper"),
  right = TRUE
)
test$income <- as.factor(test$income)
```

## Numerical Predictors
```{r}
num_cols <- names(train)[sapply(train, is.numeric)]
for (col in num_cols) {
  print(
    ggplot(train_train, aes_string(x = col, color = "Cancer")) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Density of", col, "by Cancer"),
        x = col,
        y = "Density",
        fill = "Class"
      )
  )
}
```

```{r}
num_vars <- train %>%
  select(where(is.numeric), -Cancer) %>%
  names()

for (v in num_vars) {
  p <- ggplot(train, aes(x = Cancer, y = .data[[v]])) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.6) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Boxplot of", v, "by Cancer Status"),
      x = "Cancer",
      y = v
    )
  
  print(p)
}
```

```{r}
anova_results <- sapply(num_vars, function(v) {
  summary(aov(train[[v]] ~ train$Cancer))[[1]]["Pr(>F)"][1]
})
sorted_anova <- sort(unlist(anova_results))
sorted_anova
```

## Categorical Predictors
```{r}
train[] <- lapply(train, function(x) if (is.character(x)) as.factor(x) else x)
test[] <- lapply(test, function(x) if (is.character(x)) as.factor(x) else x)

cat_vars <- names(train)[sapply(train, is.factor)]
cat_vars <- setdiff(cat_vars, "Cancer")

library(ggplot2)

for (var in cat_vars) {
  print(
    ggplot(train, aes(x = .data[[var]], fill = Cancer)) +
      geom_bar(position = "fill") +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Stacked Bar Chart of", var, "by Cancer"),
        x = var,
        y = "Proportion"
      )
  )
}
```
```{r}
str(train)
```

## Chi-Squared Test
```{r}
chisq_results <- sapply(cat_vars, function(var) {
  tbl <- table(train[[var]], train$Cancer)
  chisq.test(tbl)$p.value
})

sort(chisq_results)
```


# GLM

```{r}
train <- read.csv("trainCancerTrain.csv", row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
test <- read.csv("trainCancerTestNoY.csv", row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

train$Cancer <- as.factor(train$Cancer)
```

## Variable Selection

```{r}
train <- train[ c("age", "avg_daily_uv", "number_of_lesions", "sunburns_last_year",
  "lesion_size_mm", "sunscreen_spf", "years_lived_at_address", "family_history", "train_tone", "sunscreen_freq",
  "immunosuppressed", "outdoor_job", "occupation", "tanning_bed_use", "desk_height_cm", 
  "clothing_protection", "train_photosensitivity", "hat_use", "distance_from_beach_km", "Cancer")]

test <- test[ c("age", "avg_daily_uv", "number_of_lesions", "sunburns_last_year",
  "lesion_size_mm", "sunscreen_spf", "years_lived_at_address", "family_history", "train_tone", "sunscreen_freq",
  "immunosuppressed", "outdoor_job", "occupation", "tanning_bed_use", "desk_height_cm", 
  "clothing_protection", "train_photosensitivity", "hat_use", "distance_from_beach_km")]
```

## Imputation

```{r}
# numeric: mean impute + scaling
# categorical: distinct category

set.seed(2025)

train$.y <- ifelse(train$Cancer == "Malignant", 1L, 0L)
y_train <- train$.y

num_cols <- names(train)[sapply(train, is.numeric)]
num_cols <- setdiff(num_cols, ".y")   # remove label if present

cat_cols <- names(train)[sapply(train, function(x) is.character(x) || is.factor(x))]
cat_cols <- setdiff(cat_cols, c("Cancer"))
```

```{r}
num_mean <- sapply(train[num_cols], function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))

for (v in num_cols) {
  train[[v]][is.na(train[[v]])] <- num_mean[[v]]
  test[[v]][is.na(test[[v]])]  <- num_mean[[v]]
}

for (v in cat_cols) {
  train[[v]][is.na(train[[v]])] <- "data not available"
  test[[v]][is.na(test[[v]])]  <- "data not available"
}
```

## Scale

```{r}
scale_pp <- preProcess(train[num_cols], method = c("center", "scale"))
train_scaled_nums <- predict(scale_pp, train[num_cols])
test_scaled_nums  <- predict(scale_pp, test[num_cols])

train_scaled <- train
test_scaled  <- test

train_scaled[num_cols] <- train_scaled_nums
test_scaled[num_cols]  <- test_scaled_nums

predictor_vars <- setdiff(names(train_scaled), c("Cancer", ".y"))

fmla_no_y <- as.formula(paste0("~", paste(predictor_vars, collapse = " + "), " -1"))
x_train <- model.matrix(fmla_no_y, data = train_scaled)
x_test  <- model.matrix(fmla_no_y, data = test_scaled)

common_cols <- intersect(colnames(x_train), colnames(x_test))
x_train <- x_train[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]
x_test  <- x_test[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]

y_train <- as.numeric(train_scaled$.y)
```

```{r}
for (col in cat_cols) {
  p <- ggplot(train_scaled, aes(x = .data[[col]], fill = Cancer)) +
    geom_bar(position = "fill") + 
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) + 
    labs(title = paste("Distribution by", col), x = col, fill = "Cancer") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  print(p) 
}
```

```{r}
for (col in num_cols) {
  p <- ggplot(train_scaled, aes(x = .data[[col]], fill = factor(Cancer))) + 
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(title = paste("Distribution by", col), 
         x = col, 
         fill = "Cancer Status") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  print(p)
}
```

## Elastic Net

```{r}
cvfit <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x_train,
  y = y_train,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha = 0.5,
  nfolds = 10,
  type.measure = "auc",
  standardize = TRUE
)

best_lambda <- cvfit$lambda.min
cat("Selected lambda:", best_lambda, "\n")
```

## Final Model

```{r}
final_fit <- glmnet(x_train, y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 0.5, lambda = best_lambda, standardize = TRUE)
final_fit$beta
```

## Accuracy

```{r}
pred_prob_train <- as.vector(predict(final_fit, x_train, type = "response")[,1])
pred_class_train <- ifelse(pred_prob_train > 0.5, "Malignant", "Benign")
train_auc <- as.numeric(auc(roc(y_train, pred_prob_train)))
train_acc <- mean(pred_class_train == train_scaled$Cancer)

cat("Train AUC:", round(train_auc, 4), "\n")
cat("Train Accuracy (0.5):", round(train_acc, 4), "\n")

pred_prob_test <- as.vector(predict(final_fit, x_test, type = "response")[,1])
pred_class_test <- ifelse(pred_prob_test > 0.5, "Malignant", "Benign")
```
